grant_title: Lowell requests $7M in HUD funding for 2026
project_area: affordable housing, homelessness services, food insecurity, domestic violence support, economic development, public facility projects
demographic_requirements: primarily low- and moderate-income residents, neighborhoods with high concentrations of low- and moderate-income residents
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include local nonprofits and city departments. Funding supports programs addressing homelessness, food insecurity, housing, domestic violence, youth programming, and economic development. Priority is given to projects benefiting low- and moderate-income residents in Lowell.
